colleges:
CREATE TABLE `colleges` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `name` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `code` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '1',
  `metadata` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `header_image` longblob,
  `footer_image` longblob,
  `header_image_type` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `footer_image_type` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `unique_college_name` (`name`),
  UNIQUE KEY `unique_college_code` (`code`),
  KEY `idx_is_active` (`is_active`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=13 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
courses:
CREATE TABLE `courses` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `college_id` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `code` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL,
  `level` enum('diploma','ug','pg') DEFAULT 'ug',
  `total_years` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '4',
  `semesters_per_year` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '2',
  `year_semester_config` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `metadata` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '1',
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `unique_course_name_college` (`college_id`,`name`),
  UNIQUE KEY `unique_course_code` (`code`),
  KEY `idx_courses_college_id` (`college_id`),
  KEY `idx_college_id` (`college_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_course_college` FOREIGN KEY (`college_id`) REFERENCES `colleges` (`id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=22 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci
course_branches:
CREATE TABLE `course_branches` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `course_id` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `code` varchar(50) DEFAULT NULL,
  `total_years` tinyint DEFAULT NULL,
  `semesters_per_year` tinyint DEFAULT NULL,
  `year_semester_config` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `metadata` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '1',
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `academic_year_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `unique_branch_per_course_year` (`course_id`,`name`,`academic_year_id`),
  KEY `idx_branch_academic_year` (`academic_year_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `course_branches_ibfk_1` FOREIGN KEY (`course_id`) REFERENCES `courses` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=214 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci
subjects:
CREATE TABLE `subjects` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `college_id` int NOT NULL,
  `course_id` int NOT NULL,
  `branch_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `code` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `subject_type` enum('theory','lab') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'theory',
  `units` int DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Number of units for theory subjects',
  `experiments_count` int DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Number of experiments for lab subjects',
  `credits` decimal(3,1) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Credit hours for the subject',
  `is_active` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '1',
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_college_course` (`college_id`,`course_id`),
  KEY `idx_branch` (`branch_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=11 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
timetable_entries:
CREATE TABLE `timetable_entries` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `branch_id` int NOT NULL,
  `batch` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `year_of_study` tinyint NOT NULL,
  `semester_number` tinyint NOT NULL,
  `day_of_week` enum('MON','TUE','WED','THUR','FRI','SAT','SUN') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `period_slot_id` int NOT NULL,
  `subject_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `type` enum('subject','lab','break','other') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'subject',
  `custom_label` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `span` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uk_slot` (`branch_id`,`year_of_study`,`semester_number`,`day_of_week`,`period_slot_id`),
  KEY `idx_branch_year_sem` (`branch_id`,`year_of_study`,`semester_number`),
  KEY `period_slot_id` (`period_slot_id`),
  KEY `subject_id` (`subject_id`),
  KEY `idx_branch_year_sem_batch` (`branch_id`,`year_of_study`,`semester_number`,`batch`),
  CONSTRAINT `timetable_entries_ibfk_1` FOREIGN KEY (`branch_id`) REFERENCES `course_branches` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `timetable_entries_ibfk_2` FOREIGN KEY (`period_slot_id`) REFERENCES `period_slots` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `timetable_entries_ibfk_3` FOREIGN KEY (`subject_id`) REFERENCES `subjects` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=60 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
